# Handover — generated by runner

This file is generated by `slice_status`. Do not author it manually.

The runner assembles this from `state.json` (which is itself derived from `slices/*/acceptance-result.json` and `gates/*/result.json`). The content below is the template the runner fills.

---

## Build outcome

Generated at: `{{derived_at}}`
Posture: `{{posture}}`

## Slice status

| Slice | Status | Core proof | Reasons |
|---|---|---|---|
{{#each slices}}
| `{{id}}` | {{status}} | {{core_proof_summary}} | {{reasons}} |
{{/each}}

**Legend:**
- `complete` — all `core_proof_required` paths observed end-to-end with `upgrades_claim: true`.
- `partial` — one or more `core_proof_required` paths blocked, failed, or missing; product loop is incomplete for this slice.
- `stale` — ux-contract version changed since slice was accepted; re-acceptance required.
- `not-started` — no `acceptance-result.json` found.

## Gate status

| Gate | Status | Signoff | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
{{#each gates}}
| `{{id}}` | {{status}} | {{signoff_summary}} | {{inactive_reason_or_findings}} |
{{/each}}

## Overall readiness

**`{{overall_status}}`** — `complete` only when every included slice is `complete` and every active gate is `passed`.

Any slice with `partial` status means the product loop is **not complete** for that surface. These are the specific incomplete paths:

{{#each partial_paths}}
- Slice `{{slice_id}}`: path `{{path_id}}` — {{reason}}
{{/each}}

## Continue from here

{{#if any_partial}}
The following work is required before any slice can be promoted from `partial` to `complete`:

{{#each partial_paths}}
1. Slice `{{slice_id}}`: {{action_required}}
{{/each}}
{{/if}}

{{#if inactive_gates}}
The following gates are inactive at `{{posture}}` posture and must be activated before promoting to a higher posture:

{{#each inactive_gates}}
- `{{id}}`: active at posture `{{active_when_posture}}`
{{/each}}
{{/if}}
